displayTitle = "ZYArKit.sys"

{{< block "grid-1" >}}
{{< column "mt-2 pt-1">}}


# ZYArKit.sys ![:inline](/images/twitter_verified.png) 

### Description

V-secure ZYArKit.sys version 2.0.13.5 is a signed kernel driver assessed in public KOSEC BYOVD research. KOSEC documents an IOCTL path that references a user-supplied process handle and reaches ZwTerminateProcess, allowing administrator-context termination of non-protected processes from kernel mode.
- **UUID**: f2032ff3-9c67-4d48-981b-2479babb153d
- **Created**: 2026-06-16
- **Author**: Michael Haag
- **Acknowledgement**: KOSEC LLC | [](https://twitter.com/)

{{< button "https://github.com/magicsword-io/LOLDrivers/raw/main/drivers/d751a1ebc49ecd3ce75ef683878057db.bin" "Download" >}}
{{< tip "warning" >}}
This download link contains the vulnerable driver!

{{< /tip >}}

{{< blockbanner "ZYArKit.sys" >}}
### Commands

```
sc.exe create ZYArKit binPath=C:\windows\temp\ZYArKit.sys type=kernel &amp;&amp; sc.exe start ZYArKit
```


| Use Case | Privileges | Operating System | 
|:---- | ---- | ---- |
| Terminate non-protected processes from kernel mode through a vulnerable IOCTL path. | kernel | Windows 10, Windows 11 |



### Detections


{{< block "grid-3" >}}
{{< column >}}

{{< details "Expand" >}}
